creator: rene@FreeBSD.org
text:
New patch at http://people.freebsd.org/~rene/patches/dos2unix.diff.txt
If patching fails (patch generated with 'svn diff'), try
http://people.freebsd.org/~patches/bsd.port.mk (r337137)

- Slightly change logic for USE_DOS2UNIX=3DYES case (use DOS2UNIX_REGEX
instead of _DOS2UNIX_ALL and follow original if/else flow)
- Move block above the code that includes the USES files so that
dos2unix.mk actually gets included.

Ren=E9
